Off Calendar Sep-15-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Amy P. Chambers; Klinedinst PC; 619-400-8000; appearing as counsel for defendant Leo Bautista, as trustee of the Carmen Solis Settlement Trust.
Jessica Alexandra; Alexandra Law Firm; 415-350-9795; appearing as counsel for plaintiffs Pascual Ajenel Ramos and Masayo Takayama.

Tim Curran, Masayo Takayama, Santiago Ramos, and Ronaldo Ramos are in attendance.

Hearing held. Counsel decline to call any witnesses or hear testimony, and rest on their papers. Plaintiff objects to evidence submitted by defendants as hearsay. The parties discuss the injunction and whether it is still necessary. The parties agree that the injunction is no longer needed in light of events that have occured since the injunction was granted. Defendant argues that plaintiffs have been paying only $600 of the $800 in rent due each month, and requests that the court order they pay the outstanding balance. Whether this issue should be brought to the Rent Board is discussed between the parties. The court instructs counsel to meet and confer as to the form of order to be presented to the court for execution. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court rules as follows:

MOTION OF DEFENDANT LEO BAUTISTA, AS TRUSTEE OF THE CARMEN SOLIS SETTLEMENT TRUST FOR ORDER DISSOLVING AND/OR MODIFYING THE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION is granted.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
